concept: Design me a game where the player character leaves behind afterimages that repeat your recent actions after a short delay. Solve intricate timing puzzles by creating chains of duplicates that trigger mechanisms in sequence while you move on to the next stage of the solution. Navigate environments where your echoes can either help by operating unreachable controls or hinder by triggering hazards if your movements aren't carefully planned. Unravel the mystery of why you've become untethered from standard temporal physics and the entity responsible for your chronal fragmentation.
